test.support.script_helper/support/HAVE_.name: HAVE_DOCSTRINGS
test.support.script_helper/support/HAVE_.description: Set to True if function docstrings are available. See the python -OO option, which strips docstrings of functions implemented in Python. See also the MISSING_C_DOCSTRINGS variable.

info.excerpt: Set to True if function docstrings are available. See the python -OO option, which strips docstrings of functions implemented in Python. See also the MISSING_C_DOCSTRINGS variable.
